info.description: One 'next step' card that points readers from this page to another offering. Add up to 3 per page.

label.description: Card title. Example: 'The Reset Room' or 'Signal & Build'.

link.description: Where the card takes people. Use an internal path like /the-work/regulated or a full URL.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label above the title. Examples: 'Go deeper', 'Next step', 'Or this'. Leave blank to hide.

blurb.description: One-line description shown under the title. Keep it tight — ~12 words.

image.description: Optional thumbnail (square or landscape). If left blank the card is text-only.
